Basic IB commission is 40% of broker profit.
You will receive commission during the whole lifetime of your traders on the platform.
block_05: Advanced IB commission is 45% of broker profit. It is activated if you bring in 20 active traders within a month.
block_06: Note: Advanced commission is active for the following 30 days. To keep advanced commision, you need to bring another 20 active traders within 30 days.
